prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, Renji Dawnblade in a crimson guild cloak and reinforced leather armor stands at a wooden quest board. Mika Emberlane, an androgynous scout in a cropped travel jacket, stands beside him. Renji points to a detailed parchment map pinned to the board, his expression focused. The camera captures a medium shot of both characters in a bright, cinematic anime art style. No text, no watermarks, clear cooperative body language.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mika Emberlane traces a path on the map with a gloved finger, then looks up at Renji Dawnblade. Renji nods in agreement, and they both reach out to carefully unpin the scroll from the board together to finalize the goblin raid bounty. Consistent character appearance, lighting, and camera angle. No text, no watermarks, fluid cooperative motion.
